info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory can either be built upon or destroyed.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: If the ground floor of a theory collapses, the entirety of it does too.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory needs to be constructed over time.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: Theories can have cracks in them which can cause them to collapse.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: An unsuccessful theory can have many different structural issues.

info.name: text-delete
info.text: A theory can either be a skyscraper or rubble.
